groundedContext.query: What is the next grounded reflection for the active governed automation task "Automate comms-tab prompt construction" in phase "Comms Tab Prompt Automation"?
semanticNodeLabels: Automate prompt-building inside the comms tab so the user experience collapses to standard chat input/output plus a compact operations display showing prompt construction in real time.
Reduce comms tab to standard chat I/O
The comms tab primary surface is reduced to normal chat input/output.
The primary comms-tab surface is standard chat input/output.
The resulting architecture is ready for Victor-mediated automation under Builder Console governance.
recommendedNextActions: Reduce comms tab to standard chat input/output

before.title: Automate comms-tab prompt construction
before.description: Move prompt-building components behind an automated pipeline so the visible interface becomes standard chat input/output with a small operations panel that streams prompt-construction steps as they happen.
acceptance: Prompt-building logic is automated instead of manually assembled through multiple visible components.
The comms tab primary surface is reduced to normal chat input/output.
A compact operations display shows prompt construction/provenance in real time.
The operations display is observable without overwhelming the main conversation flow.
The resulting architecture is ready for Victor-mediated automation under Builder Console governance.
